title: Fresh Buckets
description: A Minecraft resource pack that adds 3D bucket models!
body:
<center>
  
![Cyber's Fresh Buckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc71119dc527bdbc17678e8b6260b8e7031f984.png)

<hr>

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png)

Give your inventory a fresh look! This pack replaces all default bucket textures with detailed 3D models. On Minecraft 1.21.5 and above, axolotl buckets now feature unique textures based on their in-game variants. On Minecraft 1.21.6 and above, axolotl, fish and tadpole buckets are animated for an even more immersive experience! Perfect for adding depth and realism without straying from the vanilla style.

<hr>

![Images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5deeb64ca6bb18c92e7f7549e80319edce898f0.png)

![All the Buckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95561fcb467d973efcd90dd912ecc130546c471b.png)

<hr>

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)

<details>
<summary>Recommended Mods</summary>

[![HoldMyItems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8108654883aaca19ccdadf2a83eba944e75e9c7_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)[![RespackOpts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13b7857a664622417b4458bc6cd51497b434d700_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Required Mods on 1.21.3 and below</summary>

[![Pommel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6bfb250fa199ed94abd7cbc96a5b1de32ad3471.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models)[![Sinytra Connector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a2550ea87d37326852ab16160adbc860adf3a31_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

</details>

<hr>

![Upcoming Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b6e383aea47901c3b3b0bc3cc4aed78bebacf7.png)

More Nameable Variants.

Backport to 1.21.1 and 1.20.1

<hr>

![Extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5cdff06b99e6c7ba21ae04072e98688dd2674b.png)

Special thanks to [Pato](https://modrinth.com/user/patovskiz) for porting my pack to the older versions. Special thanks to [BennyMcCarthy](https://modrinth.com/user/BennyMcCarthy_) for updating the bucket texture. Special thanks to [Braytonks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld), who's not only excellent at making stuff, but also in explaining how to!

<hr>
